hero.title: Strategic Trainings
hero.subtitle: Supporting leaders, managers and teams to build key competencies and drive sustainable organizational progress.

programs.title: 4 structured training groups
programs.subtitle: Each group addresses a specific strategic axis, with concrete modules and measurable benefits.

items.label: Group A
items.subtitle: Strategy, Vision & Institutional Steering
items.description: Provide a clear direction, decide intelligently, and manage with rigor.

items.label: Group B
items.subtitle: Human Capital, Leadership & Performance
items.description: Align teams, strengthen leadership and boost performance.

items.label: Group C
items.subtitle: Organization, Processes & Operational Transformation
items.description: Optimize processes, modernize the organization and strengthen resilience.

items.label: Group D
items.subtitle: Communication, Relations, Ethics & Partnerships
items.description: Enhance reputation, relationships and institutional impact.

A.label: Group A
A.subtitle: Strategy, Vision & Institutional Governance
A.description: Provide clear direction, decide wisely, manage with rigor.

A1.title: Clarifying Vision and Strategic Orientations

points.1: Identify short, medium and long-term strategic priorities
points.5: Ensure consistency between strategy and institutional values

A1.benefits: Clear vision, aligned objectives, better organizational cohesion, relevant strategic decisions.

A2.title: Aligning Organizational Objectives

points.0: Define operational objectives for each department
points.1: Ensure consistency across all hierarchical levels
points.4: Identify gaps and adjust action plans
points.5: Create a strategic dashboard

A2.benefits: Better coordination, effective results monitoring, resource optimization, goal achievement.

A3.title: Improving Governance and Management

points.2: Define roles and responsibilities of leaders
points.5: Train teams in good governance practices

A3.benefits: Transparent and accountable decisions, risk reduction, effective activity management.

A4.title: Decision-Making Support

points.5: Monitor results and adjust decisions

A4.benefits: Informed decisions, risk anticipation, better organizational efficiency.

A5.title: Operational Strategic Planning

points.0: Define concrete actions to achieve objectives
points.1: Prioritize initiatives according to impact and feasibility
points.5: Adjust plans according to results and changes

A5.benefits: Concrete plans, rigorous monitoring, effective actions and measurable results.

A6.title: Managing Organizational Change

points.3: Train and prepare teams for new practices
points.5: Encourage buy-in and reduce resistance

A6.benefits: Successful change, rapid adoption of new practices, agile organization.

B.label: Group B
B.subtitle: Human Capital, Leadership & Performance
B.description: Align employees, strengthen leadership and boost performance.

B1.title: Human Capital Development and Alignment

points.1: Align employees with the organization's vision
points.5: Create an environment conducive to engagement

B1.benefits: Motivated and engaged employees, optimized talent, better collective performance.

B2.title: Promoting a Sustainable Performance Culture

points.4: Regularly monitor individual and collective performance
points.5: Encourage continuous improvement

B2.benefits: Sustained performance, encouraged innovation, increased accountability, organizational excellence.

B3.title: Strategic Training and Conferences

points.0: Early-year conferences on vision and alignment
points.5: Post-training follow-up to measure impact

B3.benefits: Skills enhancement, team cohesion, better understanding of strategy and vision.

B4.title: Leadership and Professional Effectiveness Training

points.5: Support managers in team management

B4.benefits: Effective and inspiring leaders, more relevant decisions, optimized team management.

B5.title: Strategic Coaching for Leaders and Managers

points.0: Support leaders in defining their objectives
points.5: Encourage exemplary team leadership

B5.benefits: Strategic leaders, greater confidence in decision-making, lasting positive impact.

B6.title: Organizational Performance Management

points.5: Align performance with strategic objectives

B6.benefits: Optimal performance, culture of excellence, strengthened strategic alignment.

C.label: Group C
C.subtitle: Organization, Processes & Operational Transformation
C.description: Optimize processes, modernize the organization and strengthen resilience.

C1.title: Public Service Optimization

points.5: Train staff in good public service practices

C1.benefits: More efficient public services, increased citizen satisfaction, modernized organization.

C2.title: Innovation and Digital Transformation

points.5: Ensure sustainability and optimization of solutions

C2.benefits: Modernized organization, optimized processes, enhanced competitiveness.

C3.title: Monitoring, Evaluation and Continuous Improvement

points.1: Measure the impact of initiatives and training
points.3: Adjust plans and strategies according to results
points.4: Encourage a culture of learning and continuous progress
points.5: Ensure effectiveness and sustainability of implemented actions

C3.benefits: Continuous improvement, proactive and effective organization, sustainable results.

C4.title: Institutional Risk Management

points.0: Identify strategic, operational and financial risks
points.1: Assess probability and impact of risks
points.3: Train teams in proactive risk management
points.5: Regularly review risk management strategies

C4.benefits: Loss reduction, problem anticipation, resilient organization.

C5.title: Developing Organizational Resilience

points.1: Develop emergency plans and business continuity
points.2: Train teams in resilience and adaptability
points.5: Monitor feedback and adjust practices

C5.benefits: Organization capable of facing crises, ensured business continuity, strengthened stability.

C6.title: Strategic Financial Resource Management

points.0: Analyze financial flows and budget needs
points.2: Establish monitoring and financial control systems
points.3: Train managers in good financial practices
points.4: Prepare short and long-term financial plans
points.5: Identify financing opportunities and financial partnerships

C6.benefits: Optimal resource utilization, cost control, informed financial decisions.

D.label: Group D
D.subtitle: Communication, Relations, Ethics & Partnerships
D.description: Strengthen image, relationships and institutional impact.

D1.title: Institutional Communication

points.0: Develop internal and external communication strategies
points.5: Ensure message consistency at all levels

D1.benefits: Better organizational image, clear and consistent communication, effective crisis management.

D2.title: Conflict Management and Mediation

points.2: Train teams in peaceful conflict resolution
points.5: Foster a harmonious work environment

D2.benefits: Reduced tensions, healthy organizational climate, increased productivity.

D3.title: Strategic Partnership Development

points.5: Increase visibility and impact of collaborative projects

D3.benefits: Successful partnerships, shared resources, enhanced strategic impact.

D4.title: Developing Social and Ethical Responsibility

points.1: Promote social responsibility within the organization
points.5: Enhance positive impact on the community

D4.benefits: Enhanced reputation, stakeholder trust, healthy organizational culture.

D5.title: Optimizing Stakeholder Relations

points.5: Enhance strategic relationships and partnerships

D5.benefits: Better collaboration, increased trust, reduced tensions and conflicts.

D6.title: Digital Skills Development

points.3: Monitor technology adoption within the organization
points.5: Integrate digital practices into operational processes

D6.benefits: Modernized organization, improved productivity, rapid adaptation to technological changes.

D7.title: Project and Institutional Program Management

points.0: Define objectives and deliverables for each project
points.2: Identify risks and plan mitigation measures
points.3: Ensure regular monitoring and quality control
points.5: Evaluate results and capitalize on good practices

D7.benefits: Successfully completed projects, respect for timelines and budgets, measurable results.
